content.rendered: Atlanta is the place to be this fall as the high performance computing community convenes for an exhilarating week of sessions, speakers, and networking at its finest. SC is an unparalleled mix of thousands of scientists, engineers, researchers, educators, programmers, and developers and who intermingle to learn, share, and grow.
